name: Action1 RMM REST API
what_it_does: Action1 cloud-native remote monitoring and management (RMM) REST API for IT teams and MSPs to automate endpoint monitoring, patch management, software deployment, and remote script execution — enabling AI agents to retrieve endpoint inventory, manage patch deployment, execute remote scripts, and monitor endpoint health through Action1's cloud-native RMM platform with no on-premise infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage endpoint management for device inventory, health status, and configuration monitoring automation, handle patch management for OS and third-party software patch identification and deployment automation, access software management for software installation, update, and removal automation, retrieve script execution for remote PowerShell and command execution on managed endpoints automation, manage policy management for endpoint policy configuration and automation rule creation, handle alert management for endpoint health alert and anomaly notification retrieval automation, access reporting for patch compliance and endpoint health reporting automation, retrieve user management for endpoint user and device assignment management automation, manage group management for endpoint group organization and policy scope automation, and integrate Action1 with PSA platforms and SIEM for MSP service delivery automation.
use_cases: Automating patch deployment and compliance tracking across managed endpoints for MSP patch management agents
Executing remote remediation scripts on endpoints for IT automation and support agents
Monitoring endpoint health and alerting on compliance violations for IT operations automation agents
Reporting on software vulnerability exposure and patch status for security operations agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale SIEM and security operations (Action1 is endpoint management; Splunk and Microsoft Sentinel serve enterprise SIEM)
Advanced threat detection and EDR (Action1 is patch and endpoint management; CrowdStrike and SentinelOne serve EDR)
Network monitoring and infrastructure management (Action1 monitors endpoints; Datadog and PRTG serve infrastructure monitoring)
best_when: An IT team or MSP wanting AI agents to automate cloud-native endpoint patch management, remote script execution, software deployment, and compliance reporting without on-premise RMM infrastructure through Action1's zero-infrastructure RMM platform.
avoid_when: ACTION1 ACCOUNT IS REQUIRED: Action1 serves IT teams and MSPs with active subscriptions; automated open-developer assumption creates account_required for organizations without Action1 agreement; automated must have Action1 account. FREE TIER IS CAPPED AT 100 ENDPOINTS: Action1 free tier supports up to 100 endpoints; automated unlimited-free assumption creates endpoint_limit_exceeded for environments exceeding free tier; automated large environments must upgrade to paid tier. SCRIPT EXECUTION REQUIRES AGENT CONNECTIVITY: Remote script execution requires Action1 agent running and connected to cloud; automated instant-execution assumption creates agent_offline for endpoints where Action1 agent has lost connectivity; automated must check agent health before executing remote commands. PATCH EXECUTION IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Patch deployment initiates asynchronous job on endpoints; automated sync-patch assumption creates status_unknown for patch results checked before endpoints complete patching; automated must poll patch job status until completion.

auth.notes: Action1 uses API key and OAuth2 for RMM REST API. REST API with JSON. Houston, TX HQ. Founded 2018 by Alex Vovk and Mike Walters (ex-Netwrix). Raised $20M (Elsewhere Partners). Products: Action1 RMM (cloud-native endpoint management), Action1 Patch Management. Free tier: up to 100 endpoints. 5,000+ organizations. Cloud-native zero-infrastructure RMM. Competes with NinjaOne, Atera, and Kaseya for cloud-native MSP RMM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: up to 100 endpoints with core patch management and remote access
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-endpoint monthly subscription; advanced features and unlimited endpoints; MSP pricing available
pricing.notes: Houston TX. $20M raised. 5,000+ orgs. Freemium up to 100 endpoints. Zero infrastructure cloud RMM.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per token; endpoint management APIs throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: ENDPOINT AGENT MUST BE ONLINE: Action1 remote operations require agent to be online and connected to Action1 cloud; automated always-available assumption creates command_pending for endpoints where agent is offline, sleeping, or disconnected; automated must check agent connectivity before issuing remote commands

PATCH RESULTS REQUIRE JOB POLLING: Patch deployment returns a job ID; automated inline-result assumption creates missing_status for deployments checked before endpoint reports completion; automated must poll patch job status using returned job ID

ORGANIZATION ISOLATION REQUIRED FOR MSP: Action1 MSP accounts manage multiple client organizations; automated single-org assumption creates cross_client_data for operations not scoped to specific client organization; automated must always scope operations to correct client organization ID

SOFTWARE DETECTION HAS UPDATE LATENCY: Action1 software inventory updates on agent check-in schedule; automated real-time assumption creates stale_inventory for software queries between agent check-ins; automated should trigger agent check-in refresh for time-sensitive software inventory queries

AUTOMATION POLICIES ARE RULE-BASED: Action1 automation uses rule-based policies for automated responses; automated script-only assumption creates automation_gap for recurring remediation not configured as Action1 automation policy; automated should use Action1 policies for repeatable automated remediation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cloud-native RMM. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Endpoint inventory, patch status, and remote execution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: RMM/patch management. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Endpoint inventory and patch compliance data.
